commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a tail-signature dedup guard to WebChat active-run final, stream-fallback, and aborted assistant append paths, with controller tests while preserving cross-run final appends.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +127. Total +151 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run. Source inspection shows current main can append a final assistant payload even when refreshed history already ends with the same assistant message, and the linked bug report matches that WebChat state race.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed for real behavior proof and the small fallback logic correction; automation cannot supply the contributor's real-environment proof.

target.title: fix(ui): deduplicate assistant messages on chat.status final event
